heading: Reimbursement to school districts for educating non-resident students
label: 5347 Reimbursement to school districts for educating non-resident students
text: Any school district educating Indian students who are members of recognized Indian tribes, who do not normally reside in the State in which such school district is located, and who are residing in Federal boarding facilities for the purposes of attending public schools within such district may, in the discretion of the Secretary of the Interior, be reimbursed by him for the full per capita costs of educating such Indian students.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 457 of this title
